summary: Append-only patches to improve Mason's watchdog restart logic, enhance resource guard and log rotation, and strengthen security isolation.

patches.description: Improves watchdog restart behavior by adding restart storm prevention with exponential backoff and max restart limits.
Enhances resource guard by adding memory and CPU usage checks and implements log rotation with size and age limits.
Strengthens security by enforcing script execution policies, isolating environment variables, and restricting network access for Mason processes.
